summary: Iteration 23: Upload Screen Error Handling Fix - All 9 backend regression tests passed (100%). All 6 critical frontend code fixes verified via static analysis (Expo React Native app not browser-renderable).
seed_data_creation: Test scripts created and cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Upload error handling fix verified. Expo React Native app (not browser-testable). Backend APIs at https://rehearse-app.preview.emergentagent.com all functional. The fix ensures no silent failures - every code path now shows a user-visible alert.

CRITICAL_FIX_1_handleSubmit_else_clause.code: } else { const storeError = useScriptStore.getState().error; Alert.alert('Save Failed', storeError || 'Could not save...')
CRITICAL_FIX_1_handleSubmit_else_clause.note: Shows 'Save Failed' alert when createScript returns null, reads store.error for specific message

CRITICAL_FIX_2_file_uri_validation.code: if (!file || !file.uri) { Alert.alert('Error', 'No file was returned...'); return; }
CRITICAL_FIX_2_file_uri_validation.note: Validates file.uri exists after picker before proceeding

CRITICAL_FIX_3_txt_file_loaded_alert.code: Alert.alert('File Loaded', `"${file.name}" loaded. Review the text below and tap Save Script.`)
CRITICAL_FIX_3_txt_file_loaded_alert.note: TXT files show confirmation with instructions to tap Save Script

CRITICAL_FIX_4_empty_file_check.code: if (!content || content.trim().length === 0) { Alert.alert('Empty File'...); setLoading(false); return; }
CRITICAL_FIX_4_empty_file_check.note: Checks for empty TXT content before setting state

locations.msg: [Upload] File picked: name=, mime=, size=, uri=

LOGGING_console_logs.note: Comprehensive step-by-step logging at every stage for device debugging

STORE_ERROR_PROPAGATION.code: catch (error) { const errorMsg = getErrorMessage(error); set({ error: errorMsg, loading: false }); return null; }
STORE_ERROR_PROPAGATION.note: createScript sets store.error before returning null, which upload.tsx now reads

backend_regression_tests.description: POST /api/scripts creates script with correct structure
POST /api/scripts/upload with FormData creates script correctly

root_cause_analysis.problem: Script upload on Android showed silent failure - user saw nothing when save failed
root_cause_analysis.cause: handleSubmit() called createScript() which catches errors internally and returns null. handleSubmit then checked if(script) but had NO else clause - silent failure
solution_implemented: 1. Added else clause in handleSubmit showing 'Save Failed' alert with store.error message
2. Added file.uri validation after picker (guards against null/undefined file)
3. Added 'File Loaded' alert for TXT files with instructions to tap Save Script
4. Added empty content validation for TXT files
5. Added step-by-step console.log at every stage for debugging
root_cause_analysis.verification: Code analysis confirms all 6 critical fixes are in place

note: This is an Expo React Native app. Frontend UI testing cannot be done via browser/Playwright. The fixes have been verified through static code analysis. The actual Android device testing will need to be done by building and deploying the app.
